modules.text:
🎯 What We're Looking For : It’s not just about building something that works — it’s about how you think, structure your approach, and creatively solve real-world problems.
Here’s exactly how we will evaluate your submissions across all phases.

modules.title: EVALUATION CRITERIA
modules.text:
✅ Approach & Structure (20%)
✅ Functionality (20%)
✅ Code Quality (15%)
✅ Problem Understanding (15%)
✅ Testing & Coverage (15%)
✅ Documentation (15%)

modules.title: Level 1: IGNITION STAGE
modules.text:
The top 10 teams will be selected based on a review of their open-source contributions, past achievements, and their Level 1 solution submission, focusing on:

✅ Conceptual Clarity: A clear understanding of the problem statement and requirements.
✅ Strategic Approach: The structure of your solution and the reasoning behind your technical choices.
✅ Code Quality: Clean, readable, and efficient code.
✅Functionality: A working solution that meets all problem requirements.
✅ Documentation: Clear explanations of your logic and setup.
✅ Testing – Are there unit/integration tests? Do they cover important cases?

💡 Remember:
* This isn't just about writing code.
* Bring your logic, your curiosity, and your structured thinking.
* Experiment, iterate, and document your journey.

Your GitHub submission should reflect your approach, clarity of thought, and creativity.

modules.title: LEVEL 2: MISSION CORE
modules.text:
Winners will be selected based on a holistic evaluation of their work across the following areas:

✅ Code Quality & Functionality: How well-built, efficient, and effective is the technical solution?
✅ Innovation & Practicality: How creatively does the solution address the given problem? We will evaluate the originality of the team's approach and the overall feasibility of their proposed solution to the real-world challenge.
✅ Clarity & Effectiveness of Presentation: How well did the team communicate their project's vision, features, and value?
✅ Solution depth and impact
✅ Presentation clarity and demo quality
✅ Technical innovation and feasibility
✅ Team collaboration and communication

🎯 Key Takeaways
✨ Focus on the process as much as the solution
✨ Show your ability to think creatively and practically
✨ Quality matters more than speed
✨ Document your approach and decision points

Ready to showcase your skills and take on the challenge?
Your hackathon journey begins now. Let's build something legendary together.🚀
